name: VIP Clothing Limited
summary: VIP Clothing Limited manufactures, markets, and distributes garments in India. It offers innerwear and socks for men and women under the VIP, Frenchie, Feelings, Leader, and Brat brands. The company operates through 550 dealer network and 110,000 retail outlets in India. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Maxwell Industries Limited and changed its name to VIP Clothing Limited in October 2016. VIP Clothing Limited was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
